description: March Legate service health: liveness, queue depth (dispatchable/blocked/total), dispatch activity, workers, forwarded logs, and dispatch traces. Backed by march_legate_* (Prometheus), march-legate logs (Loki), and march-legate traces (Tempo). ONE profile-agnostic container drives every registered profile (profile is a label).

panels.description: 1 while the loop service is alive and exporting. Absence (no series) means the loop is down.
panels.title: Loop up (per profile)

panels.description: Seconds since the last completed tick. Red when stale (> 2x the 60s default interval).
panels.title: Last tick age

panels.description: Completed ticks per minute, per profile (the deterministic service loop).
panels.title: Tick rate (per profile)

panels.description: Smithy task queue: dispatchable now, blocked on dependencies, and total pending.
panels.title: Queue depth (dispatchable / blocked / total)

panels.description: Tasks ready to dispatch right now.
panels.title: Dispatchable now

panels.description: Pending tasks blocked on dependencies.
panels.title: Blocked now

panels.description: Dispatch actions vs dispatch failures over time.
panels.title: Dispatches vs failures

panels.description: Tick wall-clock duration percentiles (from march_legate_tick_duration_seconds).
panels.title: Tick duration percentiles

panels.description: Loop actions per second broken down by kind. dispatch/dispatch_failure come from march_legate_dispatch_*; every other kind (cleanup, ghost_cleanup, relaunch, babysit, steward_nudge, steward_stranded) is the action label on march_legate_loop_actions_total. A sustained steward_nudge line with no matching dispatch is a stuck/runaway watchdog.
panels.title: Loop actions by kind

panels.description: Worker sessions by state (waiting/running/idle/error/stopped/other).
panels.title: Workers by state

panels.description: Active steward (worker) sessions right now, summed across states. The per-state breakdown is the Workers-by-state panel above.
panels.title: Active stewards

panels.description: Stranded-steward nudges per second (watchdog re-prodding a steward stuck implementing with no PR). A flat-zero is healthy; a sustained line is a runaway nudge loop — the failure mode that was previously only visible by grepping the log file.
panels.title: Stranded-steward nudge rate

panels.description: Stranded-steward escalations per second (operator alert raised when a nudged steward is still stranded past the alert budget). Any nonzero value means a steward needs manual recovery.
panels.title: Steward escalations

panels.description: Forwarded loop action logs (service.name = march-legate). Dispatch/babysit/cleanup lines carry trace_id and link to the Tempo trace.
panels.title: Loop logs

panels.description: Loop errors only (dispatch/babysit/cleanup failures, tick errors).
panels.title: Loop errors

panels.description: Recent dispatch traces emitted by the loop (service.name=march-legate). One trace per dispatched unit of work (trace id = hash(slice id)); legate.dispatch nests hatchery.spawn -> spawn.start/end/steward.apply + spawn.exec. Click a trace id to open the waterfall.
panels.title: Recent dispatch traces

panels.description: Global concurrent-spawn cap vs its live draw. live > cap while dispatch is starved = the cap pinned by ghost stewards.
panels.title: Spawn budget — live vs cap vs deferred

panels.description: Node-level frontier (#289) over-counts (escalated/blocked-shadow); dispatch-ready is what the loop actually launches. A gap = phantom dispatchable.
panels.title: Dispatchable — frontier vs dispatch-ready

panels.description: ghost_cleanup_failed / relaunch_failed / cleanup_failed — the failure actions that increment no success counter (a loop failing every tick).
panels.title: Loop failures by kind

panels.description: ready = loop merges now (transient); waiting-on-approval = human review gate (not alarmed); blocked-merge-state = approved but GitHub won't merge (a stall).
panels.title: Merge readiness

panels.description: Mergeable slices blocked on a human review gate (human-paced; not alarmed).
panels.title: Waiting on approval

panels.description: Approved but GitHub won't merge (UNKNOWN/BEHIND/BLOCKED/DIRTY) — a real stall.
panels.title: Blocked on merge-state

panels.description: Age of the oldest slice currently in each lifecycle stage. Spawn (hatchery-pending) and steward (implementing) dwell drive alarms.
panels.title: Max age by stage

panels.description: Age of the oldest pr-open slice in each merge-gate. ready / blocked-merge-state dwell drive alarms; waiting-on-approval is metric-only.
panels.title: Max age by merge-gate

panels.description: p95 completed time-in-stage (analysis; not alarmed).
panels.title: Stage dwell p95
PR merge blockers & babysit fix activity

panels.description: PR-bearing slices by dominant blocker the 3-way merge-readiness panel collapses away. conflicting = base-movement / silent-conflict (#597); owes_comments = non-thread reviewer comment (#294); owes_review_threads / ci_failing.
panels.title: Merge blockers

panels.description: Per-kind babysit /smithy.fix dispatch rate: conflict_fix / review_fix / ci_fix / comment_fix. A sustained spike on one kind = thrash (a dedup regression) or a stuck PR re-armed every tick.
panels.title: Babysit fix activity (per kind)

panels.description: Age of the oldest PR-bearing slice under each blocker. conflicting>30m and owes_comments>2h drive the blocker dwell alarms.
panels.title: Max age by merge-blocker

panels.description: Tasks where the steward is parked on Claude's interactive prompt awaiting a user response (escalated as steward_awaiting_input). GET /escalations for the session id + worktree + question.
panels.title: Stewards awaiting input

title: March — Legate service
